description: Flat C++ TU with a checked-in compile_commands.json, default CLion C/C++ profile. Guards: the analyzer finds the planted smells (QD-14974), the llvmlibc/fuchsia/altera noise families stay absent (QD-14272), and no 'unknown target triple' clang-diagnostic-error (QD-14974). qodana-cpp (CLion/QDCPP) is distinct from qodana-clang (QDCL, clang-tidy tool).

expectations.reason: GUESS — pin exact ruleId from the control-run SARIF (the CLion C/C++ profile may differ from qodana-clang's). The default profile must flag the planted use-after-move; a silent zero means the analyzer found nothing (QD-14974).
The llvmlibc/fuchsia/altera check families are pure noise for ordinary C++ and must NOT appear under the default profile (QD-14272, the headline clang FP guard).
A baked-in wrong target triple surfaces as a clang-diagnostic-error 'unknown target triple', which poisons the whole TU (QD-14974). Must be absent.
